name: workflow closed-loop step plan-to-feature invokes the /feature command with TDD-Guard active
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/closed-loop-test.sh" --step plan-to-feature --plan-id p1 --tdd-guard-stub active --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'feature_invoked=true' out.txt && grep -q 'tdd_guard=active' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
